flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pratt Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $4.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pratt Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pratt Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pratt Community College fell 26% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.8k → $6.5k).
